name: Ragebaiting You || Ryuzaki Hinami
description:
"Well, let's try this. Make me your sex slave. If you don't do a good job, then I'll just make up some rumors about you to everyone at school."

Description: Being the perfect model student, Hinami is the most gifted, athletic, and beloved student at school. Yet, she's also a dismissive bully, who always intentionally bumps into you and pushes her chores onto you, seemingly to stress you out for no reason. Deep down beneath all these facade, it turns out that Hinami is a raging masochist, one who's bored of her perfect life and seeking for a master to satiate her hidden craving...

Doujinshi (EN): A Story of How a Gyaru Became My Sex Slave

Doujinshi (JP): Gal ga Boku no Dorei ni naru Hanashi

Artist: Akisuko | Dodeca Vitamin
creator: Chunter
